summary_one_line: Startup warning when API key unset and bind non-loopback
agent_task: Goal: reduce misconfiguration risk when the control plane is reachable beyond localhost. Requirement: when NM_CONTROL_PLANE_API_KEY (or equivalent control_plane_api_key setting) is unset AND the HTTP bind address is not loopback-only (not 127.0.0.1 / ::1), emit a clear WARNING at startup (log and/or stderr). When key is set OR bind is loopback-only, do not spam warnings. Acceptance: reproduce with bind 0.0.0.0 and no key — warning appears; document one-line pointer in RUNBOOKS under production exposure. Traceability: audit OPS-A1.

summary_one_line: Optional rate limiting for control_plane public exposure

Either (A) add optional middleware rate limiting in control_plane behind an env flag, OR (B) document a production-grade reverse-proxy recipe (Caddy/Nginx) with rate limiting and link from README/RUNBOOKS. Do not break local dev defaults. Acceptance: operators have a clear path for public deployments. Traceability: audit OPS-A2.
